title: bupleurum malconense
intro: Bupleurum malconense, also known as Hare's Ear or Chinese Thorny Bupleurum, is a medicinal plant species within the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which are believed to help lower fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. The health benefits of Bupleurum malconense include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum malconense is often combined with other herbs like Astragalus and Licorice root to create decoctions or teas, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
